evidence.task: Tuần 4 deep audit 10 rounds — 3 bugs found, all fixed

key_fixes: bug#37 LOW — seq range check ≤ MAX_SAFE_INTEGER in ack_protocol/session_window/ordered_receiver (precision loss above 2^53)
bug#38 HIGH — ACK/NACK timestamp + anti-replay (MAX_ACK_AGE_MS=60s); sig now binds tsMs; parseAckOrNack rejects stale envelopes

bug#39 CRIT Foundation R69.2 — NEW ordered_receiver.ts implements buffer-until-predecessor-arrives semantics. Session wires it for reliable+ordered categories (combat_action, trade_confirm). Out-of-order packets now BUFFERED + drained when gap fills, instead of dropped.
